content.heroSubtitle: Luxury Hair, Skin & Bridal Care Experience
content.aboutText: We create confidence through beauty. Expert stylists, premium products, and unforgettable results that transform not just your look — but how you feel about yourself. Step into a world of elegance and let us craft your signature style.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Experts
whyChooseUs.description: Our artists are trained at top institutions worldwide.

whyChooseUs.title: Premium Products
whyChooseUs.description: Only the finest international brands for your skin & hair.

whyChooseUs.title: Hygienic Care
whyChooseUs.description: Hospital-grade sanitization protocols for every service.

whyChooseUs.title: Personalized Styling
whyChooseUs.description: Every look is crafted uniquely for you.

whyChooseUs.title: Bridal Specialists
whyChooseUs.description: Make your special day truly unforgettable.

whyChooseUs.title: Affordable Luxury
whyChooseUs.description: Premium quality without the premium price tag.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.text: The bridal package was absolutely stunning. Every detail was perfect and I felt like royalty on my wedding day. Truly a luxury experience!

testimonials.name: Ananya Patel
testimonials.text: I've been coming here for 2 years and I'm always blown away. The team understands exactly what I want and delivers perfection every time.

testimonials.name: Meera Kapoor
testimonials.text: My hair has never felt this healthy and beautiful! The treatment they recommended was life-changing. Highly recommend to everyone.
